findings.snippet: await tx.postingRuleLine.deleteMany({ where: { postingRuleId: ruleId, organizationId } })
findings.replacement: Keep inside posting-rule service with posting-rule audit evidence.
findings.reason: Posting rule line replacement is configuration cleanup inside the accounting service and the workflow records posting rule audit evidence.
Password history pruning is non-economic retention cleanup scoped to a single user after recording the new hash.

findings.replacement: Keep service-owned catalog relationship cleanup scoped through active item and supplier ownership.
